observations.recommendation: We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the Accountable Officer to submit the Cashbook, LGU (Annex E-8), pursuant to Section 100 of Presidential Decree No. 1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.

We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the Municipal Treasurer to exert more effort to collect the real property tax receivable and the Municipal Assessor to provide the names of the real property taxpayers to the audit team, pursuant to Section 6 of the Commission on Audit (COA) Circular No. 92-382 dated July 3, 1992.

We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to instruct the Municipal Accountant to adjust the Property, Plant and Equipment, Accumulated Depreciation and Government Equity Accounts by applying the depreciation on the Machinery under the Trust Fund, pursuant to Section 59 of the Philippine Public Sector Accounting Standards (PPSAS) 17 – Property, Plant and Equipment, Volume II.

We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the personnel concerned to provide the audit team with the information on the list of recipients and on the output of agricultural produce during the period in the Notes to Financial Statements, pursuant to Section 44 of the Philippine Public Sector Accounting Standards (PPSAS) 27 – Agriculture, Volume II.

We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the Municipal Accountant to disclose the Inter – Agency Payable Account of ₱ 473,645.76 in the Notes to Financial Statements for our examination on the ensuing year, in accordance with Section 59 of the Presidential Decree (PD) No. 1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.

We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the Municipal Accountant to make the necessary adjusting entry on the Depreciation Account, pursuant to Section 59 of the Philippine Public Sector Accounting Standards (PPSAS) 17 – Property, Plant and Equipment, Volume II.
We commend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) on his effort to monitor the immediate settlement of the Notice of Suspension. .

We commend the Municipal Government of General Salipada K. Pendatun, Maguindanao on its effort to implement the Comprehensive Land Use Plan (CLUP), Comprehensive Development Plan (CDP), Executive Legislative Agenda (ELA) and Local Development Investment Plan (LDIP) in accordance with Section 106 of the Republic Act No. 7160, otherwise known as the Local Government Code of the Philippines.

We recognize the effort of the Local Chief Executive (LCE) on the implementation of the Annual Investment Plan for CY 2016 pursuant to Section 305 (g) of the Republic Act (RA) No. 7160, otherwise known as the Local Government Code of the Philippines.

We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to submit the Solid Waste Management Plan in accordance with the Section 16 of the Republic Act (RA) No. 7160, otherwise known as the Local Government Code of the Philippines.

We recognize the effort of the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to implement the Local Disaster Risk Reduction and Management, pursuant to Section 39 of the Republic Act (RA) No. 10717, otherwise known as the General Appropriation Act of FY 2016.

We recommend to the management to submit the Revised Notes to Financial Statements with the complete disclosures of account balances of the General Fund, Special Education Fund and Trust Fund as of December 31, 2016, pursuant to Section 109 of the Presidential Decree (PD) No. 1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.

We recommend to the management to submit to the audit team the complete documents on transaction involving procurement on infrastructure, office supplies and equipment in accordance with Section 4(6) of the Presidential Decree (PD) No.1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.

We commend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) for its effort to provide the audit team the progressive report on result of the livelihood of the beneficiaries, pursuant to Section 35 of the Republic Act (RA) No. 10717, otherwise known as the FY 2016 General Appropriation Act.

We recommend that the Municipal Accountant should prepare and update the Bank Reconciliation Statement (BRS) to ensure timely and accurate financial reporting of the account Cash in Bank-Local Currency, Current Account-111.
observations.managementAction: The management acted on the preparation of the Bank Reconciliation Statements.

observations.recommendation: We recommend that the head of Agency should create a committee to conduct complete physical inventory of Property, Plant and Equipment (PPE) at least once a year, pursuant to COA Circular No.80-124 dated January 18, 1980. Section 490 of GAAM Volume 1 and Section 58 of PD 1445 and prepare the report of the Physical Count of PPE (RPCPPE).
observations.managementAction: The management is presently conducting inventory with partial report.

observations.recommendation: We recommend to the Local Chief Executive to direct the Municipal Accountant and Disbursing Officer to give priority on the preparation and submission of the required reports, facilitate timely review and verification of transaction, pursuant to Section 74 of Presidential Decree No.1445 and COA Circular No.96-011 dated October 02, 1996.
observations.managementAction: The management prepared the report and submitted to the team.

observations.recommendation:
Pursuant to Section 04(n) of the Manual on the New Government Accounting System (For Local Government Units), we recommend that the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the Municipal Accountant to make an adjusting journal  entry to correct the Statement of Financial Position for CY 2014, as follows:

Government 
    Equity 23,077,941.80
   Public 
     Infrastructure 23,077,941.80

   To transfer Public Infrastructures to Registry of Public Infrastructures at year end.

We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to submit the cashbooks and Monthly Bank Reconciliation Statements (BRSs) with the Bank Statements as well as the paid checks and Subsidiary Ledger in accordance with Section 100 of Presidential Decree No. 1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.

We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the Municipal Accountant to remit the Due to GSIS Account of ₱ 102,233.45 to the Government Service Insurance System (GSIS) and Due to PAG IBIG account of            ₱ 12,375.00 to the Home Development Mutual Fund pursuant to section 3.4, Rule III of the Implementing Rules and Regulations (IRR) of the Republic Act No. 8291, otherwise known as GSIS Act of 1997 and Section 3 of the Implementing Rules and Regulations of the Republic Act No. 9679, otherwise known as Home Development Mutual Fund Law of 2009 or PAGIBIG, respectively.
observations.managementAction: 6. The LCE instructed the full settlement of all remittances which will appear in the CY 2016 AAR.

observations.recommendation: We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the personnel concern to settle their respective Notice of Suspension, pursuant to COA Circular No. 2009-006 dated September 15, 2009.
observations.managementAction: 7.The personnel concerned settled all Notice of Suspension.

observations.recommendation: We recommend to the management to submit the required reports and disbursement vouchers together with the supporting documents, pursuant to Section 100 and 122 of the Presidential Decree No. 1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.
observations.managementAction: 8.The Municipal Accountant submitted the financial reports.

observations.recommendation: 9. We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to direct the Municipal Accountant to submit to the Audit Team the Notes to Financial Statements and Statement of Comparison of Budget and Actual Amount, pursuant to Section 109 of the Presidential Decree No. 1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.
observations.managementAction: 9. The Municipal Accountant submitted the Notes to Financial Statement.

observations.recommendation: 10. We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to instruct the Municipal Accountant to submit the books of accounts, pursuant to Section 111 of the Presidential Decree No. 1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.
observations.managementAction: 10. The Municipal Accountant submitted the books of Accounts.

observations.recommendation: We recommend to the Local Chief Executive (LCE) to instruct the focal personnel on GAD to submit the Gender and Development (GAD) Plan, Budget and Utilization for CY 2015, pursuant to Section 33 of the Republic Act No.10651, otherwise known as the FY 2015 General Appropriation Act and Section 122 of the Presidential Decree No.1445, otherwise known as the Government Auditing Code of the Philippines.
observations.managementAction: The LCE instructed the focal person to submit the GAD’s Plan, Budget and Utilization.
